headline: ComEd’s Massive Storm Response Might Change The Case For Investing In Exelon (EXC)
summary: In early July 2026, Exelon’s ComEd unit spent several days restoring power to roughly 297,000 northern Illinois customers after multiple severe storms and extreme heat stressed the grid and prompted temporary conservation requests. The scale and visibility of these restoration efforts underscored Exelon’s role as essential infrastructure in managing both weather-driven disruptions and rising grid demand. We’ll now examine how ComEd’s large-scale storm restoration work and grid stress could...
